title: WOS Studio (Authoring) — Scenario
description: Studio Scenario per studio-authoring/specs/scenario-authoring.md. Standalone schema (not a $ref-composition with wos-tooling.schema.json — see CM §6.1 corrected pattern, 2026-05-01: there is no scenarios $def in wos-tooling). Runtime correlate is `conformanceTrace.fixtureRef` in wos-tooling.schema.json which cites `scenario.id`. Carries scenario type (happy-path, equity-probe, accessibility-check, jurisdictional-variation, manual-override, runtime-observation-replay, etc.), initial case state, event sequence, expected terminals, and (for v4 cross-cutting) cohort-comparison shape for equity-probe scenarios. Top-level document MAY carry one Scenario or a `scenarios[]` collection.
$comment: Promotion status (Stage-3, 2026-05-01): MVP shape; scenarioType enum is closed-but-extensible by reviewer judgment.

x-lm.intent: Document type marker for the Studio Scenario (or scenario collection)

$wosStudioScenario.description: Document marker pinning this artifact to the Studio Scenario 1.0 schema.

$wosTooling.description: Optional dual-marker: when this document is also intended to project to wos-tooling.schema.json scenarios[*], carries the wos-tooling document marker.

kind.description: Optional document kind discriminator (e.g., 'scenarios' for collection form).

scenarios.description: Collection form: many scenarios in one document.

scenarioType.description: Scenario kind. Equity-probe / accessibility-check / jurisdictional-variation / runtime-observation-replay added v4 per scenario-authoring.md SA-MUST-scn-040-043.

x-lm.intent: Scenario type drives readiness rule applicability (e.g., equity-probe scenarios required for ProtectedCategory-bearing workflows)

rule.description: Rule id this scenario primarily exercises (when applicable).

event_sequence.description: Ordered events fed to the workflow under test.

expected_assertions.description: Free-form reviewer-readable assertions (e.g., 'Notice of Adverse Action issued in BOTH en-US and es-US').

cohorts.description: Cohorts for equity-probe scenarios (paired demographic cohorts).

lifecycleState.description: Scenario lifecycle state per scenario-authoring.md. Enum lives in wos-studio-common.schema.json.

decisionTableCoverage.description: When the scenario exercises a DecisionTable, the row ids it covers.
